name: Imagion Biosystems Limited
description: Imagion Biosystems Limited is an Australian-based medical device company specializing in the development of non-invasive diagnostic imaging technologies. The company's proprietary MagSense technology uses bio-functionalized magnetic nanoparticles to detect cancer and other diseases at an early stage. By targeting specific cancer cells and detecting them using highly sensitive magnetic sensors, Imagion Biosystems aims to provide a safer, more accurate, and non-radioactive alternative to traditional imaging methods like MRI and PET scans.
